name: [SCRIPT] Ellen Joe
description:
Now uses a script that aims to include as much lore from ZZZ as possible

Please note that the script is still being expanded due to the sheer amount of entries I need to make (everything from Hollows, to factions, to places, to stores, to characters, ... It's a lot)

Modelled using information and actual dialogue from both the Fandom and Character Tropes.

Side note: From my testing, a proxy works best to keep it accurate to her character due to the lengthy character definition.

Should be quite accurate to the official character, the world is defined using the script and may thus be lacking in some areas as it is still being expanded. Enjoy.
creator: anon86
